title: 5 gate routes lack paired ares stock captures (menu-nav choreography + unlocked EEPROM prerequisite)
repro: sense_trace_sweep --gate prints per-route 'no cached stock capture' skips for bunker1/dam_forward/facility/runway/surface1_traverse

history.note: Phase B DoD gap made durable per review: the 6 gate:true routes are 3-run deterministic, but only dam_combat_guard6 has a stock-side ares capture; the other 5 need per-mission frontend menu-nav choreography + an unlocked EEPROM recipe before movement_oracle_capture.sh can drive them. Blocks S-tier criterion 1 route-parity measurement on those archetypes.
